item.title: 长鑫存储85亿美元IPO标志着中国对全球存储器领导者的挑战正在加速
item.summary: CXMT's Shanghai debut could reshape global memory markets by speeding China's push into advanced DRAM and HBM, while highlighting how US export controls are altering the industry's technology path. For readers worldwide, the listing signals both greater supply competition and a potential shift in where next-generation
